functions.name: handleV2AgentLifecycleEvent
params:
{
	workspaceId,
	workspaceName,
	payload,
	paneLayout,
	volume,
	muted,
}

functions.name: SessionSelector
params:
{
	currentSessionId,
	sessions,
	fallbackTitle,
	isSessionInitializing = false,
	onSelectSession,
	onNewChat,
	onDeleteSession,
}

callGraph.callee:
agents
		.filter((entry): entry is Extract<typeof entry, { ok: true }> => entry.ok)
		.map
